content: WebSearch consensus (community blogs, not official docs): recreating Gradient/Shader objects every paint() call is the main avoidable cost in animated CustomPainters; mitigate by minimizing per-frame allocations (reuse Paint/Path/Rect objects), keeping shouldRepaint narrow, and wrapping the CustomPaint in a RepaintBoundary to contain repaint cost to just that layer. LinearGradient with few stops is cheaper than complex/many-stop gradients. No official Flutter doc quantifies the exact cost; treat as directional guidance, not a hard number.
